source: Chat-observed screenshots provided by Karoline on 2026-05-18 plus local source trace and verified post-fix source state on 2026-05-18.

in_progress_findings.summary: German Today UI surfaced English evening reflection nudge copy ('Evening reflection', 'Close the day with one quick reflection.'). Source fix routes TodayStore.EveningReflectionNudge through semantic kind data and TodayView formats via existing localized notification.prompt.eveningReflection.* and notification.prompt.homeWrappedReflection.* keys.
observed_strings_pre_fix: Close the day with one quick reflection.
post_fix_source_trace: owlory_xcode/Owlory/Core/Application/TodayStore.swift:551 EveningReflectionNudge struct now has semantic Kind enum (.eveningReflection, .homeWrappedReflection); no English title/message strings emitted from Application.

owlory_xcode/Owlory/Resources/de.lproj/Localizable.strings:231-234 German values exist for all four keys: 'Abendreflexion', 'Schließen Sie den Tag mit einer kurzen Reflexion.', 'Haushalt abgeschlossen', 'Alle Haushaltsaufgaben sind erledigt. Schließen Sie den Tag mit einer kurzen Reflexion.'.
in_progress_findings.blocker_for_closure: No rerun screenshot of the German Today surface has been preserved under automation/proofs/. The chat-observed screenshot was captured before the fix; a post-fix capture is required to move HIG-DE-001 to state closed-fixed.
in_progress_findings.additional_screenshot_evidence: Captured German Today launch-surface screenshot at automation/proofs/app-localization-hig-multisurface-screenshot-harness/20260518T103428Z-today-capture/04-locale-de-surface-today.png shows zero English copy on the Today dashboard (header 'Heute', greeting 'Was ist heute aktiv?', body 'Stabiler Tag. Vertrauen Sie dem Plan.', Einchecken row, German tab labels). The evening-reflection-nudge state itself fires only late in the day and is not directly captured here. To close HIG-DE-001, a screenshot at evening-reflection trigger time (or a debug fixture forcing the state) is still needed.
in_progress_findings.closure_blocker_now: Evening-reflection-state-specific screenshot; the source fix is verified in the daytime launch surface.

missing_evidence_for_pass: committed Build Info screenshot artifact with complete gate fields
post-fix Today screenshot for German showing the reflection nudge in localized copy
primary empty state and primary action screenshots
standard and Larger Accessibility Text evidence

changes: Moved HIG-DE-001 from blocking_findings to in_progress_findings with source_fix_confirmed=true.
Updated hig_areas.labels_actions from fail to source-fix-confirmed-pending-rerun.
Added post_fix_source_trace pointing at the localized routing and the German .strings values.
Preserved overall gate_result=fail because scoped UI evidence has not been captured after the fix.
next_required_evidence: Post-fix German Today screenshot preserved under automation/proofs/ with manifest.json hashes.

Additional scoped HIG surface evidence (root tabs, primary empty states, primary actions, date/count/plural, Dynamic Type pass) captured via app-localization-hig-multisurface-screenshot-harness with --capture and --label-overrides for de.

changes: Added screenshot evidence for the German Today launch surface (no visible English copy).
HIG-DE-001 stays in_progress because the evening-reflection state itself fires only late in the day and was not directly captured.
